markets.early_close_condition:
The Last Trading Time will be 11:59 PM ET on May 06, 2026 regardless of any data releases or events occurring. Expiration will occur on the sooner of the first 7:00 or 8:00
AM ET following the release of the data for May 06, 2026, or one week after May 06, 2026.
markets.rules_primary: If the highest temperature recorded at Chicago Midway, IL for May 06, 2026, is between 59-60° according to the National Weather Service's Climatological Report (Daily), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Not all weather data is the same. While checking a source like AccuWeather or Google Weather may help guide your decision, the official and final value used to determine this market is the highest temperature as reported by the corresponding NWS Climatological Report (Daily) linked in the rules above. Preliminary NWS reporting and measurement methods may be subject to underlying rounding and conversion nuances. Traders should exercise caution when interpreting preliminary NWS data.
markets.subtitle: 59° to 60°
markets.title: Will the high temp in Chicago be 59-60° on May 6, 2026?
